title: GPT-5.5 is a total freak
summary: AI Search reviews OpenAI's GPT-5.5, showcasing its capabilities across code generation, digital earth, ray tracing, medical imaging, 3D rendering, music composition, and video game creation. The video evaluates the model's performance including hallucination behavior and provides specifications and benchmark comparisons.
